# NexDyne Consulting Group

> Management consulting firm for growing companies (roughly 20–200 employees)
> navigating AI adoption, automation, and operational scale. Core doctrine:
> Human Intelligence Governance (HIG™) — govern intelligence before you scale
> it; technology should make good people faster inside a business that is
> ready to use it responsibly.

NexDyne Consulting Group is headquartered at 4595 Broadmoor Ave SE, Suite 115,
Grand Rapids, MI 49512, USA, and serves growing companies nationwide.
Founder & CEO: David Seyaker. Website: https://nexdynegroup.com
Contact: contact@nexdynegroup.com

## What NexDyne does

- AI & automation consulting for small and mid-sized businesses: readiness
  assessment, use-case prioritization, responsible implementation plans, and
  AI governance (including shadow-AI policy).
- Operations consulting: process documentation, ownership and decision rights,
  data/reporting single-source-of-truth, scaling readiness, cost and
  working-capital discipline.
- Position: most AI projects fail before implementation begins — because the
  process was unclear, the data was scattered, or no one owned the outcome.
  Readiness comes before tooling.

## Free readiness tools (public landing pages)

- [The SMB AI Readiness Guide](https://nexdynegroup.com/resources/ai-readiness-guide):
  a free, self-scored 10-question diagnostic (process, data, workforce,
  governance) that tells a leadership team whether the business is ready to
  invest in AI — bands: 0–7 not ready, 8–14 partially ready, 15–20 ready.
- [The Operations Readiness Checklist](https://nexdynegroup.com/resources/operations-readiness-checklist):
  a free 15-point check across the five systems that break first when a
  company scales — process & documentation, roles & ownership, data &
  reporting, systems & handoffs, risk & resilience.
- [All free resources](https://nexdynegroup.com/resources)

## Key pages

- [Capabilities](https://nexdynegroup.com/capabilities): Artificial
  Intelligence, Operations, Technology, Strategy & Corporate Finance,
  Business Building, Growth/Marketing/Sales.
- [AI consulting](https://nexdynegroup.com/capabilities/artificial-intelligence)
- [Operations consulting](https://nexdynegroup.com/capabilities/operations)
- [Solutions](https://nexdynegroup.com/solutions): productized programs
  (Intelligent Process Optimization, Data-Driven Customer Intelligence,
  Scalable Enterprise Transformation, Accelerating Business Growth).
- [Industries](https://nexdynegroup.com/industries): 16 industry practices.
- [Insights](https://nexdynegroup.com/insights): practical articles on AI
  readiness, governance, automation ROI, operations, and finance for growing
  companies.
- [Case studies](https://nexdynegroup.com/cases)
- [About](https://nexdynegroup.com/about) · [Contact](https://nexdynegroup.com/contact)

## Notable perspectives (representative articles)

- [Shadow AI Is the New Shadow IT](https://nexdynegroup.com/insights/shadow-ai-inside-your-firm):
  unapproved AI tools already draft proposals and answer customers; firms
  should govern their way out (visibility first, rules second, bans never).
- [The AI Adoption Outlook 2026](https://nexdynegroup.com/insights/ai-adoption-outlook-2026):
  the dividing line is not who adopts AI but who governs it.
- [Winning with governed AI at growing companies](https://nexdynegroup.com/insights/practical-ai-guide):
  practical AI without a data-science team — clear problem, stable process,
  human ownership of decisions.
